creator: rnoland@2hip.net
text:
- Update to 0.9.7

	I removed the WITH_OPTIMIZED_BYTESWAP bits, which only did anything
on FreeBSD versions < 4.7.  Clean up portlint warnings.

Removed file(s):
- files/extra-patch-dvdread::bswap.h
- files/patch-dvdread::bswap.h
- files/patch-dvdread::dvd_input.c
